body:
Mina, just wanted to follow up on our conversation from earlier this week — I've been thinking more about the [Threshold Ventures](people/mina-kapoor) positioning and I think there's a real opening for us to co-lead the [Verdant Grid](companies/verdant-grid) round before year-end. As of right now, [Soren Alves](people/soren-alves) is still CEO over there and he's been incredibly responsive to our diligence requests, which gives me confidence the process can move quickly. I know you had some reservations about the hardware dependency in their stack, but I think the team has de-risked that considerably with the Q3 pilot results. Can we get on a call early next week to align on valuation expectations before either of us moves forward independently? I'd hate for us to end up on opposite sides of a cap table when our theses are this complementary.

— Amara
